name: Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Adani One ICICI Bank terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 3,00,000 and above in a calendar year
Flight voucher on completing Rs 10,000 spends within 60 days of card activation
additionalBenefits: 3% reward points on Adani One ecosystem, Adani-managed airports, Trainman, gas, electricity and more
1% Adani reward points on other domestic spend categories excluding fuel and rent
1.5% Adani reward points on international spends
2 complimentary domestic lounge accesses per quarter
25% off up to Rs 100 twice every month on BookMyShow
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions up to Rs 4,000

salaried: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
